# Galactic Pilgrimage
## Scripture
"By faith Abraham, when called to go to a place he would later receive as his inheritance, obeyed and went, even though he did not know where he was going." - Hebrews 11:8

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial journey our planet embarks upon. The Earth's rotation, orbit, and tilt all work together in a beautiful dance, influencing our seasons and surroundings. Similarly, our lives are a pilgrimage, with God orchestrating every step. Just as the planets follow their divinely appointed paths, we're called to trust in God's sovereignty, even when the journey ahead is uncertain. Abraham's faith is a powerful example of this trust, as he obeyed God's call to venture into the unknown.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we navigate the twists and turns of our own pilgrimage, help us to trust in Your goodness and wisdom. Just as the galaxies and stars follow their predetermined courses, guide us along the path You've ordained for us. May our hearts be filled with faith and obedience, even when the road ahead is unclear. Thank You for the celestial reminders of Your majesty and control. May we reflect Your light and love to a world in need, as we journey through the vast expanse of life, with You as our constant companion and guide.
